real_sse_format.notes: Real qwen3 uses Transfer-Encoding: chunked (NO Content-Length), Connection: keep-alive, Content-Encoding: br (Brotli), CORS with specific origin + credentials

eventstream_tab.CRITICAL: STILL zero events even without Content-Length

test_373_phase3b25c_no_content_length.response_tab: Failed to load response data - Request with the provided ID has already finished loading
test_373_phase3b25c_no_content_length.hypothesis_result: REJECTED — Content-Length removal alone does NOT fix SSE parsing

likely_root_causes: 1. Missing Transfer-Encoding: chunked — browser may not process SSE without chunked encoding
2. Connection: close causes immediate completion — JS fetch reader gets no stream chunks
3. SSE body data format mismatch with what qwen3 JS parser expects
4. CORS mismatch may cause JS to reject response (origin * vs specific + credentials)

next_steps: Add Transfer-Encoding: chunked to SSE response
Match CORS headers exactly: Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://chat.qwen.ai + Credentials: true
Consider: qwen3 JS may use fetch() ReadableStream, not EventSource — needs chunked transfer to work
Alternative: abandon SSE approach for qwen3, use simple error page (non-SSE content-type)
recommendations.priority: Transfer-Encoding: chunked is likely the #1 missing piece
